principle: Recommend with evidence. The plugin is not an enforcement allowlist; execution belongs to the current host, and every in-runtime write still needs exact approval.

boundaries.reason: Reading user-selected data is non-mutating. Host-assisted browser reads must be attended, keep browser_read provenance and freshness, and never expose credentials or session material to the plugin.
The athlete explicitly submitted a local note. Saving it as evidence does not change the approved plan.
Analysis may run immediately, but uncertain portions and ingredients must be confirmed before logging.
Image-based nutrition values are estimates and become athlete data only after confirmation.
Training changes must be presented as a proposal with evidence, never silently applied.

The checked-in judge flow uses a Garmin-shaped simulation and still requires approval. A real browser, script, or other plugin action is delegated to the current host and is not authorized or vetoed by this simulation gate.

The optional reference runtime ships no provider-write executor. When a host supplies one, the runtime still requires an attended session plus an exact, expiring, one-use approval envelope; explicit user-selected actions outside this runtime are delegated to the host.
StrideOS provides wellness coaching, not diagnosis or treatment. Urgent symptoms require qualified care.
